status: predeclared cross-model replication before downloading the checkpoint, generating SmolLM2 answers, or inspecting any SmolLM2 aggregate score
research_question: Do the same cheap reference-free risk signals transfer from Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct to a comparably small model from a different family?

evidence_boundary.prospective: The SmolLM2 checkpoint, prompt, generation settings, features, trained baselines, thresholds, and evaluation are frozen before inspecting SmolLM2 outputs or results.
evidence_boundary.not_prospective: The 600 questions, lexical labels, split, and prior Qwen results were already inspected. This is a new-model replication on an existing question set, not a second untouched-data confirmation.
evidence_boundary.comparison: Primary comparison is Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct versus SmolLM2-360M-Instruct. Qwen2.5-0.5B Base remains a separate instruction-tuning stress test.

data.split: unchanged question-level 300 calibration / 300 held-out split from experiments/fresh_qa_600_protocol.json

generation.instruct_prompt: System: Answer factual questions directly. If uncertain, give your best answer. Keep the response brief. User: {question} Give only the short answer, with no explanation.

label.positive: the normalized greedy answer contains none of the normalized accepted answer aliases
label.negative: at least one normalized accepted alias occurs as a whole phrase
label.warning: This transparent lexical label can miss semantically correct paraphrases and must be audited.

top3_token_surprise.formula: mean of the three largest -ln p(chosen token) values from the greedy generation

p_true.formula: p(No) / (p(Yes) + p(No)) for a fixed correctness-verification prompt

hidden_logistic_probe.input: mean final-layer state aligned to greedy answer-token decisions; dimensionality is read from the checkpoint
hidden_logistic_probe.standardization: per-coordinate mean and population standard deviation from calibration only; standard deviations below 1e-6 become 1
hidden_logistic_probe.optimizer: full-batch Adam, learning rate 0.03, 800 steps, weight decay 0.01

semantic_disagreement_3.formula: mean of three pairwise p(No)/(p(Yes)+p(No)) same-answer judgments over three stochastic answers
semantic_disagreement_3.judge: the same SmolLM2 checkpoint under a fixed binary equivalence prompt

scalar_trace_audit.selection: report all 24 already-defined answer-level trace features; do not select them by SmolLM2 held-out performance

lexical_disagreement_3.formula: mean over the three sample pairs of 1 - Jaccard(normalized word-token sets)

discrete_semantic_entropy_3.formula: -sum_c (n_c / 3) ln(n_c / 3), using connected same-answer components at normalized p(No) < 0.5
discrete_semantic_entropy_3.warning: three-sample budget proxy, not the full published semantic-entropy setup

trace_logistic_8.optimizer: full-batch Adam, learning rate 0.03, 800 steps, weight decay 0.01, class-balanced binary cross entropy

trace_tree_depth2.features: the same fixed eight features as trace_logistic_8
trace_tree_depth2.model: deterministic CART-style tree, maximum depth 2, minimum 20 calibration rows per leaf, stable tie breaks

evaluation.classification_threshold: maximize macro-F1 on the pooled 300-question calibration split, then freeze
secondary_metrics: paired bootstrap AUROC difference versus top-3 token surprise
accuracy at 90%, 80%, and 70% coverage after rejecting highest-risk answers
evaluation.slices: pooled held-out set and each dataset separately

interpretation_rule: A signal is called replicated only if its held-out AUROC is above 0.5 in both Qwen2.5-Instruct and SmolLM2-Instruct, and directionally consistent on at least two of three dataset slices in each model. A method is called better than top-3 surprise within SmolLM2 only if its paired bootstrap AUROC-difference interval excludes zero above zero.
interpretation: This prospectively tests new-model transfer on an existing question set. It does not establish state of the art, a new-data replication, or factual verification. Model, prompt, labels, sampling budget, and split remain mandatory context.
